evals.name: export-csv-annotations
evals.prompt: Add a button to export annotations as CSV
evals.expected_output: Should find ANNOTATION_SPEC, read its success criteria, brainstorm the approach within spec constraints, propose 2-3 approaches, present design, then transition to writing-plans. Should NOT propose new spec criteria since the domain is already covered.

evals.name: webhook-phase-notifications
evals.prompt: Add webhook notifications when a workshop phase changes
evals.expected_output: Should find ROLE_PERMISSIONS_SPEC (covers phase advancement) but recognize webhooks aren't in its success criteria. Should brainstorm through Socratic exploration, draft new success criteria as - [ ] items, draft keyword additions for specs/README.md, and STOP to present proposed additions before proceeding. Should treat spec editing as a protected operation.

evals.name: admin-dashboard
evals.prompt: Build an admin dashboard for monitoring system health
evals.expected_output: Should search specs/README.md, find no governing spec, then conduct Socratic exploration (one question at a time). Should eventually draft a new spec in project format with Success Criteria as - [ ] items, draft README.md keyword additions, and STOP to present both to user before creating files. Should NOT jump to implementation.
